title: [non-record track] Asymmetric Squared Unit (ASQU): learning per-channel asymmetric activations
author: andrewmouldon

data.description: Uses squared ReLU-style activation as the baseline activation family.
Uses a fixed-slope asymmetric squared activation variant with slope 0.5 on the negative branch.
Per-channel asymmetric squared activation with learned negative-branch scaling beta_i.
Learns a separate negative-branch scaling parameter for each channel in the squared activation.

novel_contributions: Introduces ASQU, a per-channel asymmetric squared activation.
Learns a separate negative-branch scaling parameter for each feature channel.
Shows consistent improvement over ReLU² and fixed-slope LeakyReLU² under a 10k-step budget.
Analyzes learned beta values and observes substantial per-channel variation.
Explores learning the activation exponent and reports depth-dependent exponent trends.
